news.t: AXS Investments Introduces Tradr ETFs and Rebrands SARK, TARK, TSLQ and NVDS
AXS to Ring the Nasdaq Opening Bell to Celebrate Historic Launch of First-Ever U.S. Single Stock ETFs
AXS Investments Broadens ETF Lineup with Launch of AXS 2X Innovation ETF (TARK) and AXS Short China Internet ETF (SWEB)

overview.description: The AXS 2X Innovation ETF Fund (TARK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-fund that seeks to achieve 2x the return, for a single day, of the ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) through swap agreements with major global financial institutions. TARK was launched on May 2, 2022 and is issued by Tradr.
